summary_text: Daily trend scan completed 2026-05-27. 8 products compiled (3 fresh from ExplodingTopics + 5 established evergreens). Biggest movers: Weight Loss Peptides (+900%, 33.1K vol), Epitalon (+900%, 27.1K vol), Milky Moisturizer (+925%, 2.9K vol). Notable shift this week: PDRN Cream and Cat Toothpaste dropped off ExplodingTopics top list — replaced by peptide/fitness category (Weight Loss Peptides + Epitalon) and a new beauty entrant (Milky Moisturizer). The GLP-1 weight loss trend is expanding into the broader peptide biohacking space. Summer seasonal products (neck fan, mini projector) at peak. Content gen ready for 09:00 run.
